Home → Demo Hub → Review / Scorecard

Review surface

The last page in the guided demo is the decision page.

Use the review questions and scorecard to turn the demo into a stakeholder decision instead of a vague impression.

Go / no-go principle

Runtime activation should not begin until separately approved.

Executive questions

Is the system understandable? Is the posture safe? Is the next step clear?

Technical questions

Are validators real? Are the counts honest? Are runtime paths disabled?

Safety / compliance questions

Does the system keep runtime separate from review? Are there write paths or alert paths hidden? No.

Product questions

Does the command center communicate readiness well enough for decision-making? That is the point of the demo.

Review checklist

Use the seven-persona checklist before showing the site to stakeholders.

Open review checklist
Score areaRubricCurrent read
Stakeholder confidenceClarity of story and current stateHigh
ClarityCan reviewers explain what the system is?High
Safety confidenceAre runtime boundaries explicit?High
Demo readinessCan the browser demo be shown cleanly?High
Runtime activation readinessCan we start live execution now?No
Next-step recommendationReview and feedback firstApproved

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

Agent Command Center, the demo pages, registry presentation, dashboard copy, visual layout, simulator materials, validator descriptions, and stakeholder presentation materials are protected project materials. No license, sale, transfer, or permission to reuse is granted by viewing this demo.

This site is a static, read-only demonstration. It does not enable live automation, command execution, database writes, Supabase mutations, deployment actions, rollback execution, alert sending, or runtime activation.

Third-party names, platforms, and services referenced for context remain the property of their respective owners.
